/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/ProceduralWorld.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProceduralWorld.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProceduralWorld.dir/src/terrain/HeightMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProceduralWorld.dir/src/raytracer/Renderer.cpp.o -o ProceduralWorld  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
